sections.title: If the player is a house guest

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey, a cockatrice!

lines.speaker: Cockatrice
lines.text: [House owner] deaded me! That wasn't very nice!

sections.title: If the player is the house owner

lines.speaker: Cockatrice
lines.text: You deaded me!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, yes.

lines.speaker: Cockatrice
lines.text: What did you do that for?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A slayer master told me to.

lines.speaker: Cockatrice
lines.text: Why do the slayer masters all pick on poor cockatrice?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: They pick on lots of other creatures too.

lines.speaker: Cockatrice
lines.text: Then mount one of them on your wall and let poor cockatrice rest in peace!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So I could mount your head on my wall.

lines.speaker: Cockatrice
lines.text: Another cockatrice falls victim to the dreaded mirror shield!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't take it personally! You look good on my wall!

lines.speaker: Cockatrice
lines.text: I don't care! I think I looked better with a body!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I just wanted to.

lines.speaker: Cockatrice
lines.text: You dirty rotten swine, you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Steady on...

lines.speaker: Cockatrice
lines.text: I will kill you with my paralyzing-type magic eyes look!

lines.speaker: Cockatrice
lines.text: Dots appear in air between eyes and victim. Dot! Dot! Dotty!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Er, nothing's happening...

lines.speaker: Cockatrice
lines.text: Concentrates mental power. Eyes narrow beak clenches veins on head stand out.

lines.speaker: Cockatrice
lines.text: Strain!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're dead, cockatrice. Your eyes are glass beads. It won't work.

lines.speaker: Cockatrice
lines.text: STRA-A-AIN!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I'll leave you to it.
